zh.lifeSummary: 當Nest verch Dafydd Fras於1203年出生時，她的父親Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan28歲，母親NN verch Hywel18歲。她於1217年與Rhys ap Gronwy在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾易斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Fras
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Clemence, Francoise, Michel, Philippe.  Spanish Francisco, Baudilio, Guadalupe, Jesus, Jose Pedro, Juan, Juana.  German Dieter.
French and Catalan: nickname for a stout person, from gras ‘fat’ (from Latin crassus, Old French cras). Compare Degrace .
French: habitational name from (Le) Gras, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Degrace
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Monique.
French Canadian (Degrâce): altered form of Catalan Gras ‘fat’. Compare Degrasse .
French (Degrâce): habitational name for someone from La Grâce in Marne, named from La Grâce-Notre-Dame, an abbey founded in the 13th century near Montmirail.

variants.name: Graeser
meanings: German (also Gräser): variant of the topographic name Gras , the -er suffix denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Nest verch Dafydd Fras was born in 1203, her father, Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan, was 28 and her mother, NN verch Hywel, was 18. She married Rhys ap Gronwy in 1217, in Is Cennen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest verch Dafydd Frasが1203年に生まれた時，父Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychanは28歳，母NN verch Hywelは18歳であった。1217年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアイス センでRhys ap Gronwyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest verch Dafydd Fras(이)가 1203년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 NN verch Hywel(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 이스 세넨에서 Rhys ap Gronwy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest verch Dafydd Fras родилась в 1203 г., её отцу по имени Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали NN verch Hywel, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rhys ap Gronwy в 1217 г. в местности ис кеннен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
